changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO control_subcategories (id, control_category_id, name, description) VALUES (1, 201, 'ID.AM-1', 'Physical devices and systems within the organization are inventoried'), (2, 201, 'ID.AM-2', 'Software platforms and applications within the organization are inventoried'), (3, 201, 'ID.AM-3', 'Organizational communication and data flows are mapped'), (4, 201, 'ID.AM-4', 'External information systems are catalogued'), (5, 201, 'ID.AM-5', 'Resources (e.g., hardware, devices, data, and software) are prioritized based on their classification, criticality, and business value '), (6, 201, 'ID.AM-6', 'Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities for the entire workforce and third-party stakeholders (e.g., suppliers, customers, partners) are established'), (7, 202, 'ID.BE-1', 'The organization’s role in the supply chain is identified and communicated'), (8, 202, 'ID.BE-2', 'The organization’s place in critical infrastructure and its industry sector is identified and communicated'), (9, 202, 'ID.BE-3', 'Priorities for organizational mission, objectives, and activities are established and communicated'), (10, 202, 'ID.BE-4', 'Dependencies and critical functions for delivery of critical services are established'), (11, 202, 'ID.BE-5', 'Resilience requirements to support delivery of critical services are established'), (12, 203, 'ID.GV-1', 'Organizational information security policy is established'), (13, 203, 'ID.GV-2', ' Information security roles & responsibilities are coordinated and aligned with internal roles and external partners'), (14, 203, 'ID.GV-3', 'Legal and regulatory requirements regarding cybersecurity, including privacy and civil liberties obligations, are understood and managed'), (15, 203, 'ID.GV-4', 'Governance and risk management processes address cybersecurity risks'), (16, 204, 'ID.RA-1', 'Asset vulnerabilities are identified and documented'), (17, 204, 'ID.RA-2', 'Threat and vulnerability information is received from information sharing forums and sources'), (18, 204, 'ID.RA-3', 'Threats, both internal and external, are identified and documented'), (19, 204, 'ID.RA-4', 'Potential business impacts and likelihoods are identified'), (20, 204, 'ID.RA-5', 'Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to determine risk'), (21, 204, 'ID.RA-6', 'Risk responses are identified and prioritized'), (22, 205, 'ID.RM-1', 'Risk management processes are established, managed, and agreed to by organizational stakeholders'), (23, 205, 'ID.RM-2', 'Organizational risk tolerance is determined and clearly expressed'), (24, 205, 'ID.RM-3', 'The organization’s determination of risk tolerance is informed by its role in critical infrastructure and sector specific risk analysis'), (25, 206, 'PR.AC-1', ' Identities and credentials are managed for authorized devices and users'), (26, 206, 'PR.AC-2', 'Physical access to assets is managed and protected'), (27, 206, 'PR.AC-3', 'Remote access is managed'), (28, 206, 'PR.AC-4', 'Access permissions are managed, incorporating the principles of least privilege and separation of duties'), (29, 206, 'PR.AC-5', 'Network integrity is protected, incorporating network segregation where appropriate'), (30, 207, 'PR.AT-1', 'All users are informed and trained '), (31, 207, 'PR.AT-2', 'Privileged users understand roles & responsibilities '), (32, 207, 'PR.AT-3', 'Third-party stakeholders (e.g., suppliers, customers, partners) understand roles & responsibilities '), (33, 207, 'PR.AT-4', 'Senior executives understand roles & responsibilities '), (34, 207, 'PR.AT-5', 'Physical and information security personnel understand roles & responsibilities '), (35, 208, 'PR.DS-1', 'Data-at-rest is protected'), (36, 208, 'PR.DS-2', 'Data-in-transit is protected'), (37, 208, 'PR.DS-3', 'Assets are formally managed throughout removal, transfers, and disposition'), (38, 208, 'PR.DS-4', 'Adequate capacity to ensure availability is maintained'), (39, 208, 'PR.DS-5', 'Protections against data leaks are implemented'), (40, 208, 'PR.DS-6', 'Integrity checking mechanisms are used to verify software, firmware, and information integrity'), (41, 208, 'PR.DS-7', 'The development and testing environment(s) are separate from the production environment'), (42, 209, 'PR.IP-1', 'A baseline configuration of information technology/industrial control systems is created and maintained'), (43, 209, 'PR.IP-2', 'A System Development Life Cycle to manage systems is implemented'), (44, 209, 'PR.IP-3', 'Configuration change control processes are in place'), (45, 209, 'PR.IP-4', 'Backups of information are conducted, maintained, and tested periodically'), (46, 209, 'PR.IP-5', 'Policy and regulations regarding the physical operating environment for organizational assets are met'), (47, 209, 'PR.IP-6', 'Data is destroyed according to policy'), (48, 209, 'PR.IP-7', 'Protection processes are continuously improved'), (49, 209, 'PR.IP-8', 'Effectiveness of protection technologies is shared with appropriate parties'), (50, 209, 'PR.IP-9', 'Response plans (Incident Response and Business Continuity) and recovery plans (Incident Recovery and Disaster Recovery) are in place and managed'), (51, 209, 'PR.IP-10', 'Response and recovery plans are tested'), (52, 209, 'PR.IP-11', 'Cybersecurity is included in human resources practices (e.g., deprovisioning, personnel screening)'), (53, 209, 'PR.IP-12', 'A vulnerability management plan is developed and implemented'), (54, 210, 'PR.MA-1', 'Maintenance and repair of organizational assets is performed and logged in a timely manner, with approved and controlled tools'), (55, 210, 'PR.MA-2', 'Remote maintenance of organizational assets is approved, logged, and performed in a manner that prevents unauthorized access'), (56, 211, 'PR.PT-1', 'Audit/log records are determined, documented, implemented, and reviewed in accordance with policy'), (57, 211, 'PR.PT-2', 'Audit/log records are determined, documented, implemented, and reviewed in accordance with policy'), (58, 211, 'PR.PT-3', 'Access to systems and assets is controlled, incorporating the principle of least functionality'), (59, 211, 'PR.PT-4', 'Communications and control networks are protected'), (60, 212, 'DE.AE-1', 'A baseline of network operations and expected data flows for users and systems is established and managed'), (61, 212, 'DE.AE-2', 'Detected events are analyzed to understand attack targets and methods'), (62, 212, 'DE.AE-3', 'Event data are aggregated and correlated from multiple sources and sensors'), (63, 212, 'DE.AE-4', 'Impact of events is determined'), (64, 212, 'DE.AE-5', 'Incident alert thresholds are established'), (65, 213, 'DE.CM-1', 'The network is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events'), (66, 213, 'DE.CM-2', 'The physical environment is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events'), (67, 213, 'DE.CM-3', 'Personnel activity is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events'), (68, 213, 'DE.CM-4', 'Malicious code is detected'), (69, 213, 'DE.CM-5', 'Unauthorized mobile code is detected'), (70, 213, 'DE.CM-6:', 'External service provider activity is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events'), (71, 213, 'DE.CM-7', 'Monitoring for unauthorized personnel, connections, devices, and software is performed'), (72, 213, 'DE.CM-8:', 'Vulnerability scans are performed'), (73, 214, 'DE.DP-1', 'Roles and responsibilities for detection are well defined to ensure accountability'), (74, 214, 'DE.DP-2', 'Detection activities comply with all applicable requirements'), (75, 214, 'DE.DP-3', 'Detection processes are tested'), (76, 214, 'DE.DP-4', 'Event detection information is communicated to appropriate parties'), (77, 214, 'DE.DP-5', 'Detection processes are continuously improved'), (78, 215, 'RS.RP-1', 'Response plan is executed during or after an event'), (79, 216, 'RS.CO-1', 'Personnel know their roles and order of operations when a response is needed'), (80, 216, 'RS.CO-2', 'Events are reported consistent with established criteria'), (81, 216, 'RS.CO-3', 'Information is shared consistent with response plans'), (82, 216, 'RS.CO-4', 'Coordination with stakeholders occurs consistent with response plans'), (83, 216, 'RS.CO-5', 'Voluntary information sharing occurs with external stakeholders to achieve broader cybersecurity situational awareness '), (84, 217, 'RS.AN-1', 'Notifications from detection systems are investigated '), (85, 217, 'RS.AN-2', 'The impact of the incident is understood'), (86, 217, 'RS.AN-3', 'Forensics are performed'), (87, 217, 'RS.AN-4', 'Incidents are categorized consistent with response plans'), (88, 218, 'RS.MI-1', 'Incidents are contained'), (89, 218, 'RS.MI-2:', 'Incidents are mitigated'), (90, 218, 'RS.MI-3', 'Newly identified vulnerabilities are mitigated or documented as accepted risks'), (91, 219, 'RS.IM-1', 'Response plans incorporate lessons learned'), (92, 219, 'RS.IM-2', 'Response strategies are updated'), (93, 220, 'RC.RP-1', 'Recovery plan is executed during or after an event'), (94, 221, 'RC.IM-1', 'Recovery plans incorporate lessons learned'), (95, 221, 'RC.IM-2', 'Recovery strategies are updated'), (96, 222, 'RC.CO-1', 'Public relations are managed'), (97, 222, 'RC.CO-2', 'Reputation after an event is repaired'), (98, 222, 'RC.CO-3', 'Recovery activities are communicated to internal stakeholders and executive and management teams');
ALTER SEQUENCE control_subcategories_id_seq RESTART WITH 99;
